headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: April 25, 2026**
article:
The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the way at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Kyle Finnegan impressed on the mound with 1.2 scoreless innings and four strikeouts.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. Nathan Lukes has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain, while Yimi García has been transferred to the 60-day injured list with right elbow ulnar nerve and AC joint surgery. Other notable injuries include Caleb Thielbar's left hamstring strain, Porter Hodge's right elbow strain, Edwin Uceta's right shoulder impingement, Ryan Feltner's right ulnar nerve inflammation, Dean Kremer's right quad strain, and Robert Garcia's left shoulder inflammation.

There have been several roster moves and trades across the league. The Toronto Blue Jays acquired Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers for cash, while the Rockies traded Nicky Lopez to the Chicago Cubs for cash. The Seattle Mariners traded Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for Ty Cummings, and the Houston Astros traded Wilmy Sanchez to the New York Yankees for Braden Shewmake.

top_news.title: **Reds Rally Past Tigers in Thrilling 9-8 Victory**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds edged out the Detroit Tigers 9-8 in a high-scoring matchup, with Matt McLain leading the way at the plate. McLain hit two home runs and drove in four runs, while Kyle Finnegan impressed on the mound with 1.2 scoreless innings and four strikeouts.

top_news.title: **Orioles Rout Red Sox 10-3**
top_news.summary: The Baltimore Orioles dominated the Boston Red Sox, winning 10-3 behind a strong performance from their offense. Adley Rutschman led the charge with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Guardians Take Down Blue Jays 8-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians secured an 8-6 victory over the Toronto Blue Jays, with Angel Martínez leading the offense with 2 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs. Tommy Nance earned a strong relief appearance, striking out 3 batters in 1 inning of work.

top_news.title: Rockies Edge Mets in Thrilling 4-3 Victory
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies took down the New York Mets 4-3, securing a hard-fought win. Michael Lorenzen earned the win for the Rockies, while Antonio Senzatela notched the save.

top_news.title: **Rockies Shut Out by Mets in Thrilling Match**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 0-0 victory over the Colorado Rockies, marking a hard-fought win for the Mets. Ryan Feltner took the mound for the Rockies, but the team's offense was unable to capitalize on scoring opportunities.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Place RF Nathan Lukes on 10-Day Injured List**
top_news.summary: Nathan Lukes has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a left hamstring strain. The Toronto Blue Jays have made the roster move.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Acquire Catcher Willie MacIver**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays have bolstered their roster with the addition of catcher Willie MacIver, acquired from the Texas Rangers in a trade for cash. MacIver joins the Blue Jays' lineup.
